Package com.bonitasoft.engine.api.permission

Interface PermissionRuleSP

All Superinterfaces:
PermissionRule
public interface PermissionRuleSP extends PermissionRule
Subscription permission-rule contract: the counterpart of PermissionRule for rules that need a Subscription-edition APIAccessor (e.g. to reach DelegationAPI).

It extends the community PermissionRule so the permission service runs it through the same path as any other rule. The inherited default isAllowed(APISession, APICallContext, org.bonitasoft.engine.api.APIAccessor, Logger) performs the community-to-subscription accessor cast once, here, and forwards to the subscription-typed isAllowed(APISession, APICallContext, APIAccessor, Logger) that rules implement - so individual rules never cast.

Author:
Anthony Birembaut

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isAllowed(APISession apiSession, APICallContext apiCallContext, APIAccessor apiAccessor, Logger logger)
    Called by the engine through the inherited community contract, with the subscription accessor.
    default boolean
    isAllowed(APISession apiSession, APICallContext apiCallContext, APIAccessor apiAccessor, Logger logger)
    Adapts the community contract to the subscription one.

  • Method Details

    • isAllowed

      default boolean isAllowed(APISession apiSession, APICallContext apiCallContext, APIAccessor apiAccessor, Logger logger)
      Adapts the community contract to the subscription one. The accessor is the APIAccessorExt built by the subscription permission service, so the cast is safe; it is performed here once rather than in every subscription rule.
      Specified by:
      isAllowed in interface PermissionRule
      Parameters:
      apiSession - the api session from the user doing the api call
      apiCallContext - the context of the api call
      apiAccessor - an accessor to call apis
      Returns:
      true if the user is allowed to access the api or false otherwise

    • isAllowed

      boolean isAllowed(APISession apiSession, APICallContext apiCallContext, APIAccessor apiAccessor, Logger logger)
      Called by the engine through the inherited community contract, with the subscription accessor.
      Parameters:
      apiSession - the api session from the user doing the api call
      apiCallContext - the context of the api call
      apiAccessor - a subscription accessor to call apis, including subscription-only ones
      Returns:
      true if the user is allowed to access the api or false otherwise
